title: Kerala Backwaters Escape
description: Cruise through the serene backwaters of Alleppey, explore lush tea plantations of Munnar, and unwind on pristine beaches of Kovalam. A perfect blend of relaxation and adventure.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Kochi
itinerary.description: Arrive at Cochin International Airport. Visit Fort Kochi, Chinese Fishing Nets, and St. Francis Church. Evening Kathakali dance performance. Overnight at Kochi hotel.

itinerary.title: Kochi to Munnar
itinerary.description: Drive through scenic Western Ghats to Munnar. En route visit Cheeyappara Waterfalls and spice plantations. Evening walk through tea gardens. Overnight at Munnar resort.

itinerary.title: Munnar Exploration
itinerary.description: Visit Eravikulam National Park, Mattupetty Dam, and Top Station for panoramic valley views. Evening Ayurvedic spa session. Overnight at Munnar.

itinerary.title: Munnar to Alleppey Houseboat
itinerary.description: Drive to Alleppey and board a luxury houseboat. Cruise through Kerala's famous backwaters, palm-fringed canals, and village life. Fresh Kerala cuisine served on board. Overnight on houseboat.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning backwater cruise. Disembark and transfer to Cochin Airport for departure with unforgettable memories.

exclusions: Any items not mentioned in inclusions

title: Goa Beach Retreat
description: Experience the vibrant heart of Goa — golden beaches, Portuguese heritage, thrilling water sports, and unforgettable nightlife. The ultimate beach vacation awaits.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Goa
itinerary.description: Arrive at Goa Airport. Transfer to beach resort. Relax at Calangute Beach. Evening sunset cruise on Mandovi River with live music. Overnight at resort.

itinerary.title: North Goa Exploration
itinerary.description: Visit Fort Aguada, Anjuna Flea Market, and Vagator Beach. Try thrilling water sports — jet ski, parasailing, and banana boat ride. Evening at Baga Beach nightlife.

itinerary.title: South Goa & Heritage
itinerary.description: Explore Old Goa — Basilica of Bom Jesus, Se Cathedral. Visit Palolem Beach and Colva Beach. Evening spice plantation tour with dinner. Overnight at resort.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning leisure time at the beach. Transfer to Goa Airport for departure.

title: Rajasthan Royal Heritage Tour
description: Journey through the land of kings — majestic forts, ornate palaces, golden deserts, and vibrant bazaars. Rajasthan offers an experience that's truly royal.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Jaipur
itinerary.description: Arrive at Jaipur Airport. Visit Hawa Mahal and Jantar Mantar. Evening walk through vibrant Johari Bazaar. Overnight at Jaipur heritage hotel.

itinerary.title: Jaipur Fort & Culture
itinerary.description: Morning visit to Amber Fort with elephant ride. Explore City Palace and Albert Hall Museum. Evening Rajasthani folk dance show. Overnight at Jaipur.

itinerary.title: Jaipur to Jodhpur
itinerary.description: Drive to the Blue City of Jodhpur. Visit Mehrangarh Fort and Jaswant Thada. Evening walk through the blue lanes of old city. Overnight at Jodhpur.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur to Jaisalmer
itinerary.description: Drive through the Thar Desert to Jaisalmer. Visit Jaisalmer Fort and Patwon ki Haveli. Evening desert safari with camel ride. Overnight desert camping under stars.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer to Udaipur
itinerary.description: Morning at Sam Sand Dunes. Drive to Udaipur — City of Lakes. Evening boat ride on Lake Pichola. Overnight at Udaipur lakeside hotel.

itinerary.title: Udaipur Exploration
itinerary.description: Visit City Palace, Saheliyon ki Bari, and Jagdish Temple. Explore Fateh Sagar Lake. Evening dinner with lake view. Overnight at Udaipur.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning leisure time for shopping. Transfer to Udaipur Airport for departure.

title: Himachal Mountain Magic
bestTime: March to June, October to December
description: From the charming hill station of Shimla to the adventure capital Manali, experience snow-capped peaks, apple orchards, pristine valleys, and thrilling Himalayan adventures.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Shimla
itinerary.description: Arrive at Chandigarh and drive to Shimla. Evening stroll on the famous Mall Road and Ridge. Enjoy local street food. Overnight at Shimla hotel.

itinerary.title: Shimla Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Visit Kufri — enjoy horse riding and yak ride. Explore Jakhoo Temple and Christ Church. Evening toy train experience. Overnight at Shimla.

itinerary.title: Shimla to Manali
itinerary.description: Scenic drive through pine forests and Kullu Valley. Stop at Kullu for river rafting. Arrive Manali by evening. Overnight at Manali resort.

itinerary.title: Manali Exploration
itinerary.description: Visit Hadimba Temple, Vashisht Hot Springs, and Old Manali. Afternoon at Solang Valley for adventure sports — paragliding, zorbing. Overnight at Manali.

itinerary.title: Rohtang Pass Excursion
itinerary.description: Full day excursion to Rohtang Pass (subject to permit). Play in the snow, enjoy stunning Himalayan views. Evening bonfire at resort. Overnight at Manali.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning leisure. Drive to Chandigarh for departure with beautiful mountain memories.

title: Andaman Island Paradise
description: Turquoise waters, white sandy beaches, and vibrant coral reefs — Andaman is a tropical paradise offering world-class diving, island hopping, and total serenity.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Port Blair
itinerary.description: Arrive at Port Blair Airport. Visit Cellular Jail — a historic landmark. Attend the moving Light and Sound Show. Overnight at Port Blair hotel.

itinerary.title: Port Blair to Havelock Island
itinerary.description: Morning ferry to Havelock Island. Visit the world-famous Radhanagar Beach — voted Asia's best beach. Sunset at the beach. Overnight at Havelock beach resort.

itinerary.title: Havelock Island Adventures
itinerary.description: Morning scuba diving or snorkeling at Elephant Beach. Glass bottom boat ride over coral reefs. Afternoon relaxation at resort. Overnight at Havelock.

itinerary.title: Neil Island Excursion
itinerary.description: Ferry to Neil Island. Visit Bharatpur Beach, Laxmanpur Beach, and Natural Bridge. Enjoy crystal-clear waters and tropical scenery. Return to Havelock.

itinerary.title: Havelock to Port Blair
itinerary.description: Morning at leisure. Ferry back to Port Blair. Visit Corbyn's Cove Beach and Samudrika Marine Museum. Local market shopping. Overnight at Port Blair.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to Port Blair Airport for departure with island memories.

title: Kashmir Valley Dream
description: Discover why Kashmir is called Paradise on Earth — Dal Lake shikaras, Mughal gardens, snow-clad mountains, and the enchanting beauty of Gulmarg and Pahalgam.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Srinagar
itinerary.description: Arrive at Srinagar Airport. Check into a luxury houseboat on Dal Lake. Evening shikara ride through floating gardens and markets. Overnight on houseboat.

itinerary.title: Srinagar Mughal Gardens
itinerary.description: Visit the three famous Mughal Gardens — Nishat Bagh, Shalimar Bagh, and Chashme Shahi. Afternoon visit Shankaracharya Temple. Evening at Dal Lake. Overnight at Srinagar hotel.

itinerary.title: Srinagar to Gulmarg
itinerary.description: Drive to Gulmarg — Meadow of Flowers. Experience the world's highest Gondola ride. Enjoy snow activities in winter or meadow walks in summer. Overnight at Gulmarg.

itinerary.title: Gulmarg to Pahalgam
itinerary.description: Drive through picturesque pine forests to Pahalgam — Valley of Shepherds. Visit Aru Valley and Betaab Valley. Overnight at Pahalgam.

itinerary.title: Pahalgam to Srinagar
itinerary.description: Morning visit Chandanwari and Baisaran meadow. Drive back to Srinagar. Evening shopping for Kashmiri handicrafts, shawls, and saffron. Traditional wazwan dinner. Overnight at Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning transfer to Srinagar Airport. Depart with memories of paradise.

title: Meghalaya — The Hidden Gem
description: Explore the Scotland of the East — living root bridges, crystal-clear rivers, spectacular waterfalls, and the cleanest village in Asia. Meghalaya is India's best-kept secret.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Shillong
itinerary.description: Arrive at Guwahati Airport. Drive to Shillong. Visit Elephant Falls and Shillong Peak. Evening walk at Police Bazaar. Overnight at Shillong.

itinerary.title: Shillong to Cherrapunji
itinerary.description: Drive to Cherrapunji — one of the wettest places on earth. Visit Nohkalikai Falls, Mawsmai Cave, and Seven Sisters Falls. Overnight at Cherrapunji.

itinerary.title: Living Root Bridges
itinerary.description: Trek to the famous Double Decker Living Root Bridge in Nongriat. Swim in natural rock pools. An unforgettable adventure experience. Overnight at Cherrapunji.

itinerary.title: Dawki & Mawlynnong
itinerary.description: Visit Dawki — see the crystal-clear Umngot River. Boating on the transparent river. Visit Mawlynnong — Asia's cleanest village. Living Root Bridge at Riwai. Overnight at Shillong.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning visit Laitlum Canyon for panoramic views. Drive to Guwahati Airport for departure.
